name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the chat exporter.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? Who will benefit from it?

## Proposed solution

Describe how the feature should work.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or sketches.
